content.question: What is the relative causal contribution of the 2017–18 BTMN/SNI legal reform, per-pupil funding incentives, diagnostic-practice evolution, COVID-era effects, and genuine prevalence increase to the documented 40% growth in SNI identification over 20 years (and the sharper post-2021/22 acceleration)?
content.reduction_path: Commission a controlled retrospective analysis comparing identification rates, diagnostic-criteria application, and expert-committee decision patterns across the pre-2017, 2017–18 transition, and post-2021/22 acceleration periods, stratified by county and SNI category; cross-reference timing of legal/funding changes with statistical breakpoints.
